evidence.title: README (segment 2)
evidence.excerpt: Tocify is a free, online and open-source web application to add, edit, or generate Table of Contents (ToCs) / bookmarks for PDFs. It uses AI to parse scanned directory images or raw text into structured outlines, and creates clickable bookmarks & printable TOC pages for PDFs in cross platforms.

evidence.title: v1.2.3
evidence.excerpt: ## v1.2.3 更新 1. 修复书签跳转异常的 Bug https://github.com/anig1scur/tocify/issues/43 2. 重构渲染与缓存逻辑，提升大文件查看流畅度。 3. 偏移 modal 支持手动跳过无关或错误的匹配项。 ## v1.2.3 Update Notes 1. Refactored rendering pipeline and caching logic for reduced memory footprint and smoother viewing experience. 2. Support for manually skipping irrelevant or incorrect items during the AI generation process. 3. Resolved issues where clicking bookmarks resulted in failed navigation, encoding artifacts, or opening local directories.

evidence.title: v1.2.2
evidence.excerpt: **注意，此版本有 bug ，如需客户端使用请前往下载 v1.2.1 ，或直接使用网页版** ### v1.2.2 Updates - Support Page Labels: https://github.com/anig1scur/tocify/pull/38 @LeapSurge thanks! - Custom Font Settings: Added support for customizing the font family used in the Table of Contents. - Web Worker Optimization: Moved PDF processing to a Web Worker to prevent UI freezing during large file operations. ### v1.2.2 更新 - 支持页面标签 (Page Labels): https://github.com/anig1scur/tocify/pull/38 @LeapSurge 感谢！ - 自定义字体设置: 支持自定义目录 (ToC) 的字体设置 - Web Worker 优化: 将 PDF 处理逻辑移至 Web Worker，避免大文件操作时界面卡顿。 ### Bring Your Own API Keys 1. Gemini - https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey 2. Qwen - https://bailian.console.aliyun.com/?tab=model#/api-key 6. Doubao - https://www.volcengine.com/docs/82379/1541594?lang=zh 3. Zhipu - https://open.bigmodel.cn/usercenter/apikeys

evidence.title: v1.2.1
evidence.excerpt: # v1.2.1 ## ✨ Features / 新功能 1. Batch section add (+5/+10) / 批量添加章节 #32 2. Arrow key navigation / 方向键导航输入框 3. TOC path display & quick jump / 显示目录路径和快速跳转 ## ⚡ Performance / 性能优化 1. Memory cleanup & faster preview / 修复内存泄漏 #33 --- ### Bring Your Own API Keys 1. Gemini - https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey 2. Qwen - https://bailian.console.aliyun.com/?tab=model#/api-key 6. Doubao - https://www.volcengine.com/docs/82379/1541594?lang=zh 3.
